provenance.description: Minimal GRIB2 fixture: 2m temperature analysis, 5x5 lat/lon grid (0-40N, 0-40E, 10deg spacing). Section 0 discipline=0 (meteorological), edition=2. Section 1: center=7 (US NCEP), analysis (significance=0), 2024-06-19T00:00:00Z. Section 3 template 3.0 (lat/lon), shape=6 (WGS84), Ni=5, Nj=5, scanning_mode=0x00 (+i, -j). Section 4 template 4.0: discipline=0/cat=0/num=0 (temperature K), level type=103 (height above ground), value=2m, forecast_offset=0h. Section 5 template 5.0 (simple packing): R=270.0, E=0, D=0, nbits=8. Section 6: no bitmap (indicator=255). Section 7: 25 packed bytes X=0..24, unpacked values = 270.0+X K (270K at 40N/0E .. 294K at 0N/40E).
Minimal GRIB2 DRT=2 fixture: 3x3 lat/lon, 1 group, R=100.0 E=0 D=0 N=8. X=[0..8] -> Y=[100..108]. Section 5 template 5.2 (complex packing, no spatial differencing).

GFS 1-degree global lat/lon analysis (t00z f000), 2026-06-18 cycle. Single GRIB2 message: TMP 2m above ground, template GDT=0/PDT=0/DRT=3 (complex packing with spatial differencing), 360x181=65160 points. Byte-range extracted from gfs.t00z.pgrb2.1p00.f000 via NOMADS: bytes 35437282-35484863. Storage marked 'deferred' because gribtract does not yet implement DRT=3; change to 'inline' when DRT=3 support is added.
provenance.generated_by: curl byte-range from nomads.ncep.noaa.gov; golden by scripts/gen_golden.py (eccodes)

provenance.description: Minimal GRIB2 DRT=40 fixture: 3x2 lat/lon, JPEG2000 J2K codestream, R=100.0 E=0 D=0 N=8 (lossless). Pixels X=[0..5] -> Y=[100..105]. Section 5 template 5.40 (JPEG 2000 data compression).
Minimal GRIB2 DRT=41 fixture: 3x2 lat/lon, PNG compression, R=100.0 E=0 D=0 N=8. Pixels X=[0..5] -> Y=[100..105]. Section 5 template 5.41 (PNG data compression).

Minimal GRIB2 PDT=1 fixture: individual ensemble member forecast. 3x2 lat/lon grid (30-20N, 0-20E, 10deg spacing). Section 0 discipline=0 (meteorological), edition=2. Section 1: center=7 (US NCEP), start-of-forecast (significance=1), 2024-01-15T00:00:00Z. Section 3 template 3.0 (lat/lon), shape=6 (WGS84), Ni=3, Nj=2. Section 4 template 4.1 (individual ensemble member): discipline=0/cat=0/num=0 (temperature K), level type=100 (isobaric), 500 hPa, forecast_offset=6h. Ensemble: type=2 (negatively perturbed), perturbation_number=3, n_ensemble=20. Section 5 template 5.0 (simple packing): R=250.0, E=0, D=0, nbits=8. Section 6: no bitmap. Section 7: 6 packed bytes X=0..5, unpacked values = 250.0+X K.

Minimal GRIB2 PDT=8 fixture: time-processed statistical product (6-hour accumulation). 3x2 lat/lon grid (30-20N, 0-20E, 10deg spacing). Section 0 discipline=0 (meteorological), edition=2. Section 1: center=7 (US NCEP), start-of-forecast (significance=1), 2024-01-15T00:00:00Z. Section 3 template 3.0 (lat/lon), shape=6 (WGS84), Ni=3, Nj=2. Section 4 template 4.8 (time-processed statistical product): discipline=0/cat=1/num=8 (total precipitation kg/m^2), level type=1 (surface), forecast_offset=6h, end-of-interval=2024-01-15T06:00:00Z, n_ranges=1 (accumulation, 6-hour period). Section 5 template 5.0 (simple packing): R=0.0, E=0, D=0, nbits=8. Section 6: no bitmap. Section 7: 6 packed bytes X=0..5, unpacked values = 0.0+X = [0.0..5.0].

GFS Wave arctic 9km polar stereographic analysis (t00z f000), 2026-06-20 cycle. Single GRIB2 message: WIND (10m wind speed m/s) surface analysis. Template GDT=20 (polar stereographic)/PDT=0/DRT=40 (JPEG 2000 data compression, lossy J=0). Grid: 1012036 total points (polar stereographic). Section 5 n_packed=360052 (bitmap masks out land/ice points). Section 6: bitmap present (indicator=0), 1012036 bits. JPEG2000 codestream contains 360052 values for the 'present' (ocean) points. Sourced from noaa-gfs-bdp-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/gfs.20260620/00/wave/gridded/gfswave.t00z.arctic.9km.f000.grib2 bytes 0-427268 (field 1). No eccodes golden generated (eccodes unavailable at capture time); golden pending generation on internal cluster.

MRMS ReflectivityAtLowestAltitude Caribbean (00:00:55 UTC 2026-06-20). Single GRIB2 message: radar reflectivity (dBZ) at the lowest altitude scan. Template GDT=0 (lat/lon)/PDT=0/DRT=41 (PNG data compression). Grid: 4500000 points (lat/lon 3000x1500), no bitmap (indicator=255). Missing values are -999.0 dBZ (areas without radar coverage). Sourced from noaa-mrms-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/CARIB/ReflectivityAtLowestAltitude_00.50/20260620/MRMS_ReflectivityAtLowestAltitude_00.50_20260620-000055.grib2.gz (gunzipped). No eccodes golden generated (eccodes unavailable at capture time); golden pending generation on internal cluster.

provenance.source: NOAA NAM awip12 (NCEP Grid 218, Lambert Conformal)
provenance.description: NAM (North American Mesoscale) awip12 analysis, run 2025-01-15 00z, forecast hour F00. 196 GRIB2 messages, ALL GDT 3.30 (Lambert Conformal Conic) + DRT 3 (template 5.3: complex packing with 2nd-order spatial differencing). NCEP Grid 218: Nx=614, Ny=428 (262792 points), La1=12.19N/Lo1=226.541E, LaD=25N, LoV=265E, Latin1=Latin2=25N, Dx=Dy=12.191 km, scanningMode=0x40, bitsPerValue=15, centre=kwbc (NCEP). eccodes 2.41.0 decodes all 196 messages cleanly (ground-truth verifier). Sourced from noaa-nam-pds S3 (AWS Open Data, public, no auth, Accept-Ranges: bytes). NOTE: gribtract's own DRT=3 unpacker is not yet implemented (fails with 'buffer too short'), so this is a target fixture for DRT=3 + Lambert-conformal decoder coverage, not yet run inline — storage=remote because the 25.1 MiB file is too large to commit (lives in tests/corpus/large/, gitignored, fetched+sha256-verified by `cargo xtask corpus fetch`).
provenance.generated_by: curl from noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com; verified by eccodes 2.41.0 (gribtract project)

_comment_large: Fixtures with storage=remote live in tests/corpus/large/ (gitignored). The harness fetches them by sha256 from B2. Add a manifest entry here first, then seed the file.
_comment_deferred: Fixtures with storage=deferred are committed to small/ but not yet run inline (decoder support pending). Change to 'inline' when the corresponding DRT/template is implemented.
